{"id":"TKT-9348","customer":"free-user-1","subject":"Forgot my password","body":"Hi, I forgot my password. How do I reset it?","status":"investigating","enriched":{"tier":"free","ltv_usd":0,"prior_incidents":0},"kb_match":"KB-405"}

{"tool":{"name":"auto_resolve","args":{"reply":"Thank you for contacting us! To reset your password, please follow these steps from our knowledge base article KB-405: Visit our login page and click on \"Forgot Password.\" Enter your email address and we'll send you a password reset link. Check your email (including spam folder) and click the link to set a new password. If you don't receive the email within a few minutes, please let us know and we'll help you further."}}}
